name: Cyberwar: Neon City
short_description: Explore a cyberpunk universe where monkeys rule. Challenge the fearsome Cyber Monkeys as you take on the role of a hero armed with a living shark weapon.
detailed_description:
STAY IN TOUCH WITH US <3


About the Game

Be part of the Cyber Era by adding the game to your wishlist, it helps us a lot! <3




In a world taken over by cybernetic monkeys, humanity seeks hope in the form of a clone that is reborn after each defeat. To aid him in his mission, a living shark weapon becomes his most loyal ally against hordes of enemies in a frantic battle. Dive into the characters' memories in a surprising and twist-filled story.

A DIFFERENT HERO

To become a great hero, Printer, a newborn clone, and his shark weapon, Blue, which can shoot any type of projectile, will face great challenges on each floor of a building taken over by Cyber Monkeys.

FRENZIED COMBAT

Face dozens of enemies! Cybernetic monkeys, robots, androids, and genetically modified animals. Use your combat skills, enhance your abilities, rely on the help of trustworthy allies, and explore a wide range of distinct projectiles.

UPGRADES

With your shark weapon, you have the unique ability to store various types of shots. Your cleverness in choosing the ideal shot for each situation will be crucial. Additionally, a skill tree provides permanent improvements, while each room grants you a new upgrade. And to further enhance your options, a merchant will offer new items and drones that can be essential in your combat journey.

REPLAYABILITY

New surprises await you with each failed attempt. Whenever you return to the start, you can spend resources to improve and become stronger, as well as unlock new allies and expand your base.

A MYSTERIOUS WORLD

During his journey, Printer will discover that not everything is as it seems. With each new memory about the characters' past, our hero will find himself in a more complex and mysterious plot. New characters may appear, each providing their own perspective on what might be happening in the world of Neon City. Interact with NPCs and discover valuable information.
